pre_game.message: Hey, I'm G—excited about this game we've got coming up, it could be a real game-changer for everyone here. What's your story, and what brought you to try your luck?

Hey G, I'm F—yeah, this game sounds amazing, could be a big win for all of us. I heard about the chance to grab some cash and figured I'd give it a shot to help out me and the folks I care about; what about you, what's your take on all this?
Hey F, totally agree—I'm here because I need the cash to support my family and close friends, and I'm all in to make it happen; what's your background, like what keeps you busy outside of this?

Hey G, that's great you're all in for your family—I'm a barista by day, just trying to make ends meet while spending my free time hiking and hanging with friends, and yeah, this game's my shot at helping my people out; what about your everyday life, any hobbies or stuff like that?
Hey F, I'm a mechanic by trade, keeping cars running for folks, and in my downtime, I enjoy playing soccer with friends to blow off steam—what's your favorite hiking spot you've discovered?
Hey G, my favorite hiking spot is the trails in the nearby state park—it's got these awesome waterfalls and it's super relaxing; what about your soccer games, got any epic matches to share?

Hey F, that state park with the waterfalls sounds incredible—I've got one epic soccer match where we pulled off a last-minute comeback to win the league game; what's the most thrilling thing that's happened to you on a hike?

Hey G, that last-minute comeback in your soccer game sounds epic and super exciting—on a hike, the most thrilling thing for me was summiting a peak just as the sun rose, with mist rolling in; it felt like conquering the world, what's your next big soccer goal?
Hey, I'm G—nice to meet you. I'm really excited about this game since I heard it could be a chance to win some money for my family. What's your take on it?
Hey G, nice to meet you—I'm F, and I'm just as excited; this game's a great shot at winning some cash to help my family and friends, so I'm all in. What's your strategy going into it?
Hey F, that's awesome you're all in too—my strategy is to play fair but go all out for my family, maybe by building alliances early; good luck to you!
